scripts.enrich-assets: node scripts/enrich-ascensiondb-assets.mjs --entries dist/coa_entries.enriched.jsonl --out dist --reports reports --asset-root dist/assets --manifest reports/coa_ascensiondb_cache_manifest.json
scripts.pipeline:m1.8: npm run pipeline && npm run enrich-db && npm run apply-db-enrichment && node scripts/write-artifact-manifest.mjs reports dist reports/coa_artifact_manifest.json
scripts.pipeline:m1.9: npm run pipeline:m1.8 && npm run enrich-items && npm run build-items && npm run build-mechanics && node scripts/write-artifact-manifest.mjs reports dist reports/coa_artifact_manifest.json
scripts.pipeline:m1.9:fallback: npm run pipeline:m1.8 && npm run enrich-items && npm run build-items && npm run build-mechanics:fallback && node scripts/write-artifact-manifest.mjs reports dist reports/coa_artifact_manifest.json
scripts.test: npm run unit-test && npm run validate
